---
title: "Map"
description: "Key locations of the Narin Güran case."
page-layout: full
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css" />
      <link rel="stylesheet" href="/resources/css/site-map.css" />
---

```{=html}
<div id="site-map"></div>

<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
<script>
(function() {
  const points = [
    { lat: 37.853272, lon: 40.201844, title: 'Hacı Sait Tek camera', description: 'CCTV camera that recorded important footage during the incident.', category: 'camera', minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.836825, lon: 40.200689, title: 'School main gate camera', description: 'CCTV camera at the main gate of the school.', category: 'camera', minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.836795, lon: 40.200522, title: 'School side road camera', description: 'CCTV camera facing the school\'s side road.', category: 'camera', minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.836392, lon: 40.199694, title: "Narin's home", description: 'The home where Narin Güran and her family lived.', category: 'building', minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.836222, lon: 40.200393, title: "Nevzat Bahtiyar's home", description: 'Defendant Nevzat Bahtiyar\'s home.', category: 'building', minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.836162, lon: 40.200588, title: "Nevzat's mother's home", description: 'The home of Nevzat Bahtiyar\'s mother.', category: 'building', minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.836259, lon: 40.200541, title: "Nevzat's barn", description: 'Nevzat Bahtiyar\'s barn.', category: 'building', minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.836364, lon: 40.200442, title: 'Eggplant field', description: 'The location where Nevzat Bahtiyar claimed he was watering eggplants.', category: 'site', minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.847978, lon: 40.204864, title: 'Body recovery site', description: 'The location where Narin Güran\'s body was found.', category: 'site' }
  ];

  const makeIcon = (color) => L.icon({
    iconUrl: '/resources/images/markers/marker-icon-2x-' + color + '.png',
    shadowUrl: '/resources/images/markers/marker-shadow.png',
    iconSize: [25, 41],
    iconAnchor: [12, 41],
    popupAnchor: [1, -34],
    tooltipAnchor: [16, -28],
    shadowSize: [41, 41]
  });

  const categoryIcons = {
    camera: makeIcon('red'),
    building: makeIcon('blue'),
    site: makeIcon('orange')
  };

  const map = L.map('site-map', { maxZoom: 22 });

  // High z-index pane for prominent labels (e.g., "Diyarbakır")
  map.createPane('topLabels');
  map.getPane('topLabels').style.zIndex = 650;

  // Zoom-based visibility tracking (markers + labels)
  const zoomTracked = [];

  const bing = L.tileLayer('https://ecn.t{s}.tiles.virtualearth.net/tiles/a{q}.jpeg?g=1', {
    attribution: '© Microsoft Bing Maps',
    subdomains: ['0', '1', '2', '3'],
    maxNativeZoom: 19,
    maxZoom: 22
  });
  bing.getTileUrl = function(coords) {
    let q = '';
    for (let i = coords.z; i > 0; i--) {
      let d = 0;
      const m = 1 << (i - 1);
      if (coords.x & m) d++;
      if (coords.y & m) d += 2;
      q += d;
    }
    const s = this.options.subdomains[Math.abs(coords.x + coords.y) % 4];
    return 'https://ecn.t' + s + '.tiles.virtualearth.net/tiles/a' + q + '.jpeg?g=1';
  };

  const esri = L.tileLayer(
    'https://server.arcgisonline.com/ArcGIS/rest/services/World_Imagery/MapServer/tile/{z}/{y}/{x}',
    {
      attribution: 'Tiles © Esri, Maxar, Earthstar Geographics',
      maxNativeZoom: 17,
      maxZoom: 22
    }
  );

  const osm = L.tileLayer('https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png', {
    attribution: '© OpenStreetMap',
    maxNativeZoom: 19,
    maxZoom: 22
  });

  bing.addTo(map);

  let bingErrorCount = 0;
  bing.on('tileerror', function() {
    bingErrorCount++;
    if (bingErrorCount > 20 && map.hasLayer(bing)) {
      map.removeLayer(bing);
      esri.addTo(map);
      console.warn('Bing tile service unavailable, falling back to Esri.');
    }
  });

  const toDMS = (d, axis) => {
    const dir = axis === 'lat' ? (d >= 0 ? 'N' : 'S') : (d >= 0 ? 'E' : 'W');
    const a = Math.abs(d);
    const deg = Math.floor(a);
    const min = Math.floor((a - deg) * 60);
    const sec = ((a - deg) * 3600 - min * 60).toFixed(2);
    return deg + '°' + min + "'" + sec + '"' + dir;
  };

  const categoryLayers = {
    camera: L.layerGroup(),
    building: L.layerGroup(),
    site: L.layerGroup()
  };

  points.forEach(p => {
    const coords = toDMS(p.lat, 'lat') + ', ' + toDMS(p.lon, 'lon');
    const marker = L.marker([p.lat, p.lon], { icon: categoryIcons[p.category] })
      .bindTooltip(p.title)
      .bindPopup('<b>' + p.title + '</b>' + p.description + '<span class="coords">' + coords + '</span>');
    categoryLayers[p.category].addLayer(marker);
    zoomTracked.push({ marker, minZoom: p.minZoom ?? 0, maxZoom: p.maxZoom ?? 22 });
  });

  Object.values(categoryLayers).forEach(g => g.addTo(map));

  // Place-name labels (no marker, text only)
  // minZoom/maxZoom optional — if omitted, label is visible at all zoom levels
  // large: true → larger font
  const labels = [
    { lat: 37.920268, lon: 40.196915, text: 'Diyarbakır',         large: true },
    { lat: 37.891316, lon: 40.195971, text: 'Diyarbakır Airport', minZoom: 11 },
    { lat: 37.833916, lon: 40.199200, text: 'Tavşantepe',         minZoom: 12 },
    { lat: 37.818829, lon: 40.190692, text: 'Batıkarakoç',        minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.840070, lon: 40.228415, text: 'Çarıklı',            minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.838427, lon: 40.173912, text: 'Sarıdallı',          minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.836359, lon: 40.161209, text: 'Tellikaya',          minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.887217, lon: 40.228050, text: 'Ongözlü Bridge',     minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.867470, lon: 40.243692, text: 'Dicle',              minZoom: 13 }
  ];

  labels.forEach(l => {
    const opts = {
      icon: L.divIcon({
        className: 'site-map-label' + (l.large ? ' site-map-label--large' : ''),
        html: l.text,
        iconSize: l.large ? [180, 28] : [120, 24],
        iconAnchor: l.large ? [90, 14] : [60, 12]
      }),
      interactive: false,
      keyboard: false
    };
    if (l.large) opts.pane = 'topLabels';
    const marker = L.marker([l.lat, l.lon], opts).addTo(map);
    zoomTracked.push({ marker, minZoom: l.minZoom ?? 0, maxZoom: l.maxZoom ?? 22 });
  });

  const updateZoomVisibility = () => {
    const z = map.getZoom();
    zoomTracked.forEach(({ marker, minZoom, maxZoom }) => {
      const el = marker.getElement();
      if (!el) return;
      el.style.display = (z >= minZoom && z <= maxZoom) ? '' : 'none';
    });
  };
  map.on('zoomend', updateZoomVisibility);
  map.on('overlayadd', updateZoomVisibility);
  updateZoomVisibility();

  map.fitBounds(points.map(p => [p.lat, p.lon]), { padding: [40, 40] });

  L.control.layers(
    {
      'Satellite (Bing)': bing,
      'Satellite (Esri)': esri,
      'Streets (OSM)': osm
    },
    {
      'Cameras': categoryLayers.camera,
      'Buildings': categoryLayers.building,
      'Locations': categoryLayers.site
    },
    { collapsed: true, position: 'topleft' }
  ).addTo(map);

  L.control.scale({ imperial: false, position: 'bottomright' }).addTo(map);

  // Imagery date indicator (Esri World Imagery Metadata service)
  const ImageryDateControl = L.Control.extend({
    options: { position: 'bottomleft' },
    onAdd: function() {
      const el = L.DomUtil.create('div', 'site-map-imagery-date');
      el.innerHTML = '<span class="label">Imagery:</span><span class="value">…</span>';
      return el;
    }
  });
  new ImageryDateControl().addTo(map);

  const monthsEN = ['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec'];

  const formatImageryDate = (d) => {
    if (d === null || d === undefined) return null;
    const s = String(d).padStart(8, '0');
    if (s.length < 4) return null;
    const year = s.substring(0, 4);
    if (year < '1990' || year > '2100') return null;
    if (s.length >= 6) {
      const m = parseInt(s.substring(4, 6), 10);
      if (m >= 1 && m <= 12) return monthsEN[m - 1] + ' ' + year;
    }
    return year;
  };

  let imageryDateTimer = null;
  const updateImageryDate = async () => {
    const valueEl = document.querySelector('.site-map-imagery-date .value');
    if (!valueEl) return;
    const c = map.getCenter();
    const b = map.getBounds();
    const sw = b.getSouthWest();
    const ne = b.getNorthEast();
    const params = new URLSearchParams({
      geometry: c.lng + ',' + c.lat,
      geometryType: 'esriGeometryPoint',
      sr: '4326',
      tolerance: '1',
      layers: 'top',
      mapExtent: sw.lng + ',' + sw.lat + ',' + ne.lng + ',' + ne.lat,
      imageDisplay: '256,256,96',
      f: 'json'
    });
    const url = 'https://services.arcgisonline.com/arcgis/rest/services/Reference/World_Imagery_Metadata/MapServer/identify?' + params;
    try {
      const res = await fetch(url);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + res.status);
      const data = await res.json();
      const r = (data.results || [])[0];
      const date = r ? r.attributes.SRC_DATE2 : null;
      valueEl.textContent = formatImageryDate(date) || '—';
    } catch (e) {
      valueEl.textContent = '—';
    }
  };

  map.on('moveend', () => {
    clearTimeout(imageryDateTimer);
    imageryDateTimer = setTimeout(updateImageryDate, 500);
  });
  setTimeout(updateImageryDate, 100);

  // Dev-only: right-click to get coordinates. Active only outside production domain.
  const isDev = !window.location.hostname.includes('narineneoldu.github.io');
  if (isDev) {
    map.on('contextmenu', function(e) {
      e.originalEvent.preventDefault();
      const lat = e.latlng.lat;
      const lon = e.latlng.lng;
      const decimal = lat.toFixed(6) + ', ' + lon.toFixed(6);
      const dms = toDMS(lat, 'lat') + ', ' + toDMS(lon, 'lon');
      L.popup()
        .setLatLng(e.latlng)
        .setContent('<b>Coordinate (dev)</b><code style="display:block;margin-top:4px">' + decimal + '</code><code style="display:block">' + dms + '</code>')
        .openOn(map);
      if (navigator.clipboard) {
        navigator.clipboard.writeText(decimal).catch(() => {});
      }
      console.log('[dev-coord]', decimal, '|', dms);
    });
  }
})();
</script>
```

The map shows key locations near Tavşantepe village in the Bağlar district of Diyarbakır. Use the layer control in the upper-left corner to switch between satellite/street views and toggle marker categories.

**Color codes:** Red — cameras; Blue — buildings (homes, barn); Orange — other significant locations (eggplant field, body recovery site).

**Imagery sources:** Microsoft Bing Maps (satellite, default), Esri/Maxar (satellite, fallback), OpenStreetMap (street map).
